NAME

pem_object_t - Parsed PEM object with name and data.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


char * name
PEM object name (e.g., CERTIFICATE",PRIVATE KEY). unsigned char * data
Decoded binary data. size_t data_len
Length of data in bytes.
